1.solution:
Let fill capacity = f mÂ³/min. Drain = f+110. Time difference: 8000/f âˆ’ 8000/(f+110) = 110.
â†’ 8000Ã—110 = 110Ã—f(f+110) â†’ fÂ²+110fâˆ’8000=0.
â†’ f=(âˆ’110+âˆš(12100+32000))/2=(âˆ’110+210)/2=50.
Answer: 50 mÂ³/min.

2.solution:
P+Q combined time = 24t/7. R drains in 24t/7 hours â†’ R rate = 7/(24t).
Per 5-hr cycle (4h P+Q, 1h P+Q+R): net = 4Ã—7/(24t) + 1Ã—0 = 7/(6t).
8 cycles in 40h: 8Ã—7/(6t)=1 â†’ t=28/3. R time = 24Ã—(28/3)/7=32 hours.
Answer: C (32).

3.solution:
A+B together=16min. A fills half tank, then B fills half: a/2+b/2=32 â†’ a+b=64. 1/a+1/b=1/16 â†’ ab=1024.
â†’ a=b=32 (both 32 min alone). Leak: A with leak = 40 min â†’ leak rate=1/32âˆ’1/40=1/160.
B with leak: 1/32âˆ’1/160=4/160=1/40. Time=40 min.
Answer: 40.

4.solution:
Naren=Bâˆ’6, Gani=B, Pawan=45 days. Together finish in 12 days: 1/(Bâˆ’6)+1/B+1/45=1/12.
1/(Bâˆ’6)+1/B=1/12âˆ’1/45=11/180. Solving: 11BÂ²âˆ’426B+1080=0 â†’ B=(426Â±366)/22.
B=36 or B=30/11 (reject). Gani=36, Naren=36âˆ’6=30.
Answer: B (30).

5.solution:
y: odd composite >16, <25, sum of two primes â†’ only y=21 (=2+19, 3Ã—7).
A's effective rate=2/x (100% higher), B's effective rate=(5/6)/(xâˆ’21) (16.66% less).
For total to be same regardless of start: 2/x = 5/[6(xâˆ’21)] â†’ 12(xâˆ’21)=5x â†’ 7x=252 â†’ x=36.
Answer: 36.

6.solution:
Right triangle, hypotenuse AB=63, inradius r=21. r=(a+bâˆ’c)/2=21 â†’ a+b=105. aÂ²+bÂ²=3969, ab=3528. Area=1764 mÂ².
Circle area=Ï€rÂ²=(22/7)Ã—441=1386 mÂ². Non-circle=378 mÂ². Equivalent work=2Ã—1386+378=3150 units.
Farmer rate=3150/128/day. New farmer (20% less)=2520/128/day. Time for 378 units=378Ã—128/2520=19.2 days.
Answer: 19.2.

8.solution:
Efficiency gap=300% of A â†’ B=4A. So t_B=t_A/4. t_C=t_Bâˆ’15=t_A/4âˆ’15.
If switch 5 days earlier, task takes 1 more day: 5Ã—(r_BCâˆ’r_AC)/r_AC=1 where r_BC=B+C rate, r_AC=A+C rate.
â†’ r_BC/r_AC=6/5. Let t_A=t: (4/t+4/(tâˆ’60))/(1/t+4/(tâˆ’60))=6/5 â†’ 10t=840 â†’ t=84.
Answer: 84.

9.solution:
Rates 2,N,3; reciprocals 1/2,1/N,1/3 in AP: 2/N=1/2+1/3=5/6 â†’ N=12/5=2.4.
After: rates (2âˆ’x),N,(3âˆ’x); 1/(2âˆ’x)+1/(3âˆ’x)=5/6. Let u=2âˆ’x: 1/u+1/(u+1)=5/6.
5uÂ²âˆ’7uâˆ’6=0 â†’ u=(7Â±13)/10. u=2â†’x=0; u=âˆ’0.6â†’x=2.6.
Verify: reciprocals âˆ’5/3, 5/12, 5/2 form AP (common diff=25/12) âœ“.
Answer: C (2.6).
